meaning: int.为引起人的注意时所发的声音
examples: Psst! Let's get out now before they see us!
"Psst! Come over here!" one youth hissed furtively.
Psst, you want to know what academics talk about these days?
It's worth pointing out that the ARM-based WinRT (psst -- you can catch up on what exactly Windows RT is here ) model is both thinner and lighter than the version with Windows 8 Pro.
